assertions.expectation: Explains that exact upgrade dates are difficult to predict but several tools help narrow the window
assertions.reason: Response clearly states that GKE upgrade timing has both predictable elements and variable factors, and provides multiple tools to maximize predictability and visibility

assertions.expectation: Mentions the GKE release schedule as a 'best case' timeline — upgrades won't happen before listed dates
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'The GKE release schedule shows "best case" dates — upgrades won't happen before these dates but may happen later'

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the cluster's auto-upgrade status for the current target version and any pauses
assertions.reason: Provides specific gcloud command to check cluster's auto-upgrade target: 'gcloud container clusters describe CLUSTER_NAME --zone ZONE --format="value(nodePools[].management.autoUpgrade,releaseChannel.channel)"'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new releases roll out progressively across regions over 4-5 business days
assertions.reason: Specifically states 'New GKE versions roll out across all regions over 4-5 business days'

assertions.expectation: Recommends configuring maintenance windows so upgrades only happen during known time slots
assertions.reason: Provides detailed maintenance window configuration with gcloud command and explains 'Auto-upgrades will ONLY happen during these windows'

assertions.expectation: Mentions scheduled upgrade notifications (72h advance, opt-in via Cloud Logging)
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions '72-hour advance notifications via Cloud Logging' and provides the specific gcloud command to enable them

assertions.expectation: Notes that GKE upgrade visibility shows the cluster's target version and EoL timeline
assertions.reason: Discusses version availability API and mentions checking what's available, plus references End of Support dates throughout the response

assertions.expectation: Mentions rollout sequencing with configurable soak times for multi-cluster predictability
assertions.reason: Has a dedicated 'Multi-cluster orchestration' section with specific gcloud command showing rollout sequencing and soak duration configuration
